sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Let me check if the blue squares moved after this UP action.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check blue square positions
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'S':
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"Blue square: rows [{min(rows)}-{max(rows)}], cols [{min(cols)}-{max(cols)}]")

# Check if blues moved
if previous_frame:
    prev_seg = previous_frame.segmentation['nodes']
    prev_blues = [(n['boundary'], n['color']) for n in prev_seg if n['color'] == 'S']
    curr_blues = [(n['boundary'], n['color']) for n in seg if n['color'] == 'S']
    print(f"Blues moved: {prev_blues != curr_blues}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
